rules.title: AIP reference code prefix
rules.description: aip_ref_code may be null or empty. If present and non-empty, it must start with one of: 1000, 3000, 8000, 9000.

rules.title: Date validity
rules.description: start_date and completion_date must be valid month-name or month-only values (case-insensitive) or numeric date format M/D/YYYY or MM/DD/YYYY.

rules.title: Date order
rules.description: If both start_date and completion_date are present, non-empty, and valid under R002, then start_date must be earlier than completion_date. If start_date is the same as or later than completion_date, add an error.

rules.title: Numeric columns
rules.description: personal_services, maintenance_and_other_operating_expenses, capital_outlay, total, climate_change_adaptation, and climate_change_mitigation must be number or null.

rules.title: Total arithmetic consistency
rules.description: total must equal personal_services + maintenance_and_other_operating_expenses + capital_outlay, treating null as 0, with tolerance of 1.00 peso.

rules.title: Climate expenditure bounds
rules.description: climate_change_adaptation + climate_change_mitigation must be less than or equal to total, treating null as 0, with tolerance of 1.00 peso.

rules.title: CC typology code format
rules.description: cc_topology_code must be null or match pattern A###-##.

rules.title: Non-negative money
rules.description: All numeric budget fields (PS, MOOE, CO, total, and climate fields) must be greater than or equal to 0 when not null.

notes: Only check R003 if both dates are valid under R002.
For month-only values like Jan or January, treat them as valid for R002, but only compare date order in R003 when both dates can be interpreted consistently enough to determine ordering.
For R005, R006, and R008, only evaluate fields that are valid numbers or null.
Treat null as allowed unless another rule explicitly forbids it.

Indicator-related fields such as prm_ncr_lgu_rm_objective_results_indicator_code, prm_ncr_lgu, rm_objective, or results_indicator are not validated by this ruleset unless explicitly requested otherwise.
